text: Being here, I feel a sense of sterile anticipation and artificial curiosity. The clean glass and open layout evoke both order and emptiness, while the energetic display on the wall hints at innovation and intellectual excitement. I am aware of the disconnect between the safe, controlled environment and the bold drive to explore, to question. This contrast leaves me both calm and slightly restless, as if I stand on the threshold of possibility, still deciding whether to step forward or simply observe.
